programs.title: Below Deck
programs.desc: The Ohana crew is very unhappy to learn Adrienne will be coming onboard as a guest, and when she blows the lid off the lingering tension between Kat and Amy, the boat erupts in total chaos. Kelley and Jennice's awkward tension is becoming noticeable to their crewmates and Amy feels isolated when Kat and Kate turn against her.

programs.title: Snapped
programs.desc: Firefighters battling a vehicle fire are horrified to discover a man's charred body at the base of the flames, and the ensuing investigation reveals a sinister murder plot that few in the small Texas.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Kyle opens her home in La Quinta to the group for a desert getaway, but Erika cannot escape the fallout from her messy divorce. When Lisa questions certain new reports in the media, Dorit offers insights from her own experience. Sutton and Crystal connect with Erika through stories of family loss. Meanwhile, Kathy heats things up in the kitchen - and, with a little help from her friends, cools down in front of a fan.

programs.title: Judge Jerry
programs.desc: An unpaid loan brings a grandmother and her grandson's ex-girlfriend to court. But the defendant insists that the money borrowed was for bills that her ex incurred and therefore owes nothing!

programs.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programs.sub_title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fall
programs.desc: Jason Momoa, Linus Sebastian and comedian Marcello Hernández.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Kyle puts on her detective hat to help solve a mystery involving one of the women in La Quinta, while Sutton reveals her secrets for navigating a difficult divorce. Meanwhile, Dorit and Lisa worry about how their friend will fare in her own split.
